channel.title: Happy Day News
channel.description: Your daily dose of good news from around the world. RSSVERIFY
channel.itunes:author: Happy Day News

item.title: Happy Day News — 2026-07-15
item.description:
1. NASA's Webb Discovers Hidden Planet in Famous Star System
    Significant discovery in exoplanet research.
    Read full story →
  2. India uses color psychology to prevent wildlife collisions: 'Red roads, green intent'
    Innovative approach to wildlife conservation.
    Read full story →
  3. Going to museums, movies, and theater may help your body stay younger
    Cultural activities linked to healthier aging.
    Read full story →
  4. Teen Hailed as a Hero After Saving Woman With Dementia From Dangerous Arizona Heat
    Inspiring act of kindness and bravery.
    Read full story →
  5. The City That Chose Beauty Over Billboards
    Successful urban policy for visual pollution reduction.
    Read full story →

item.title: Happy Day News — 2026-07-16
item.description:
1. Farming Programme in Sierra Leone Empowers Amputees
    This initiative helps amputees gain skills and independence.
    Read full story →
  2. New Pangolin Species Discovered in Nepal
    This finding aids in the conservation of endangered pangolins.
    Read full story →
  3. NASA Uses Subscale Aircraft to Accelerate Flight Innovation
    This project aims to enhance flight technology and safety.
    Read full story →
  4. Captain Shiva Chauhan: First Woman Officer at Siachen
    Her achievement breaks gender barriers in the Indian Army.
    Read full story →
  5. Teen Saves Woman with Dementia from Arizona Heat
    A young hero's quick thinking prevented a potential tragedy.
    Read full story →

item.title: Happy Day News — 2026-07-16
item.description:
1. How a farming programme in Sierra Leone helps amputees rebuild lives
    Empowering amputees through sustainable farming.
    Read full story →
  2. Quantum breakthrough links light and magnetism in atomically thin materials
    New materials could revolutionize quantum technologies.
    Read full story →
  3. Worldwide 'skinny dip day' boosts body positivity and raises thousands for charity
    Event raises funds for women's health surgeries.
    Read full story →
  4. Meet Captain Shiva Chauhan, the First Woman Army Officer to Serve at Siachen's Minus 50-Degree Frontier
    Breaking barriers in the Indian Army.
    Read full story →
  5. ‘Food Really Is Medicine’
    Medically tailored meals reduce hospital visits.
    Read full story →

item.title: Happy Day News — 2026-07-17
item.description:
1. Indian Grey Hornbills Return to Gir After 60 Years
    Conservation success showing ecosystem health.
    Read full story →
  2. Recent Sightings Give Conservationists Hope for Two Endangered Whale Species
    Indications of recovery for blue and fin whales.
    Read full story →
  3. Farming Programme in Sierra Leone Helps Amputees Rebuild Lives
    Empowering amputees through sustainable farming.
    Read full story →
  4. A Cheap, Homegrown Catnip Lotion Could Replace DEET for Millions of Ugandans
    Innovative solution for mosquito repellent.
    Read full story →
  5. A Stranger Saw a Struggling Veteran at the Airport. Days Later, He Received $184,000
    Community support leads to life-changing donations.
    Read full story →

item.title: Happy Day News — 2026-07-19
